text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, it's raining heavier than it has in a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It shouldn't affect our plan to weight train indoors, though. Or so I
thought...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, how lustrously glossy my hair looks when it's wet...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The skies were crying to look upon my loveliness, and it's the duty of
a ruler to bring comfort—even to the heavens.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My ensemble with the rain began the moment I set foot out the door.
It was a sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You should've seen me running with the storming wind, adorned in raindrops. There's no other word for it, but... perfect!
choice_data_list: You were running in this weather?!
You were running in this weather?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How could I not?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Be they in drenching rain or on muddy tracks, my strides have
stunning power—they're beauty incarnate.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whenever a poor soul longs to see my running... I shall be there,
standing in the spotlight, wherever the stage may be.
choice_data_list: No matter how bad it gets outside?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! That goes without question.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For I am to become the Centurial Overlord, an unequalled source of
radiance to the world.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even the heaviest downpours and bitterest blizzards must yield to the
sun in the end.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Don't you see? If I cannot conquer the weather, how am I to conquer
the track?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...But wait, Trainer. That awestruck look in your eyes—you've become
utterly infatuated with me.
choice_data_list: I'm dumbstruck by your intense passion.
I'm dumbstruck by your intense passion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah, you flatter me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though you needn't play coy. Hesitate not to voice your
thoughts—hold back your boundless praise no longer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Compliments and accolades, after all, exist for my sake! Now is the
time, Train—achoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she's been talking, a large puddle has formed at her feet from
how wet she is. She's sure to catch a cold at this rate...
choice_data_list: Maybe you should change into dry clothes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What? I do not see the need for that... Ah! Could it be, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has my glistening appearance stirred your soul? Has it roused a bout
of bashfulness in you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I understand what you must feel! Before my unattainable beauty, are
you ashamed to look so plain?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I push her out of the room before she can launch into another
full-blown soliloquy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How could you drive me away like that to get dry clothes? I still think
you've made a grave mistake.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You let the chance of a lifetime, to bask in my rain-drenched glory,
escape you forever.
choice_data_list: It's no good to anyone if you get sick.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please. You shouldn't fear something so inconceivable. There's
only one future you need trust in.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I am going to become the Centurial Overlord and shine my light
upon the world.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: With that settled, I've important training to do. What would people say if they saw me skipping a day's hard work?
choice_data_list: But your jersey's still all wet...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Forsooth, my uniform shall have to suffice! Perhaps I'll go for a
youthful frolic by the riverbed...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The flutter of my skirt and the power of my strides contrasted with the
delicate rain. Aaah, what a superb mise-en-scene it will be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that rambling, I'm almost too worn out to say otherwise, but I'm
desperate and summon my last ounce of courage to stop her.
